rag_rules: If AGREE reports type mismatches or unresolved identifiers, trace the root cause to invalid helper declarations or missing visible features, and fix or remove the problematic clause.
When generating AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are visible in the current scope and that type declarations match the expected scalar types (int, real, bool).
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within the same annex to prevent type resolution errors.
Place component type contracts in component type scopes and implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Type declarations in AGREE must use valid scalar types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference package-qualified identifiers or data types not present in the analyzed model.
Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and matching with clauses
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair strategies
Component type and implementation scope boundaries
